backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor implementing the IPGT backend: user profiles, IP record registration/search, IPGT token ledger (transfer, burn, mint), treasury management, and access-controlled admin operations.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping the whitepaper visual-revert feature to affected files, components, and test IDs, with high confidence.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-line summaries of every frontend source file, serving as a reference index for the project's frontend structure and recent changes.
frontend/index.css: Base Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH CSS custom properties for light and dark theme tokens (background, foreground, primary, chart colors, sidebar) used throughout the app.
frontend/index.html: HTML shell with IPGT page title, favicon, and a root div that mounts the React app via main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: TanStack Router setup defining routes for Home, Register IP, IP Database, Coin Dashboard, and Whitepaper, with a root component that handles authentication state and shows the ProfileSetupModal for new users.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Site footer displaying the IPGT logo, copyright year, a caffeine.ai attribution link, and an 'Powered by ICP' tagline.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Sticky navigation header with the IPGT logo, desktop and mobile nav links (including Whitepaper), authenticated user IPGT balance display, and Internet Identity login/logout button.
frontend/src/components/IPCard.tsx: Renders a clickable card for an IP record displaying its category, title, jurisdiction, owner, registration date, and a truncated content hash with hover effects.
frontend/src/components/IPDetailModal.ts: A dialog modal that fetches and displays full details of an IP record by ID, with copyable fields for owner principal and content hash.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Wraps page content with a shared Header and Footer in a full-height flex column layout.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: A blocking dialog that prompts new users to enter their name and optional email to create a profile before using the app.
frontend/src/components/RegistrationSucc: A confirmation dialog shown after successful IP registration, displaying the new record ID and IPGT tokens burned, with options to register another or navigate to the database.
frontend/src/components/TokenStats.tsx: Displays IPGT token statistics (user balance, circulating supply, total burned) either as a compact inline badge or a full three-card grid.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A React hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous backend actor using the current Internet Identity, invalidating dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides a React context and hook for Internet Identity authentication on ICP, managing login/logout state, identity persistence, and AuthClient creation with configurable options.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for all backend interactions including user profiles, token balances/transfers, and IP record queries (fetch, search, filter).
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet importing Tailwind and custom fonts, defining CSS variables for a dark navy/gold theme, and utility classes for gold text, prose content, and print styles.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/CoinDashboard.tsx: Authenticated dashboard page for viewing IPGT token stats and transferring tokens to other principals, with form validation and error/success feedback.
frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx: Landing page featuring a hero banner, feature highlights, and navigation CTAs for browsing the IP database or registering IP, adapting based on authentication state.
frontend/src/pages/IPDatabase.tsx: Paginated, searchable, and filterable public IP records browser supporting title search, category, and jurisdiction filters with a detail modal for individual records.
frontend/src/pages/RegisterIP.tsx: IP registration page with a form for title, description, category, jurisdiction, and document hash; handles file upload with client-side SHA-256 hashing, calls the backend registerIP mutation, and shows a success modal with the assigned IP ID and IPGT burn amount.
frontend/src/pages/Whitepaper.tsx: Renders the IPGT project whitepaper as a scrollable page with a sticky table-of-contents sidebar, smooth-scroll navigation via IntersectionObserver, a generated 48-month token release schedule table, and a print stylesheet.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility module for reading URL query parameters from both standard and hash-based routes, persisting them to sessionStorage, and cleaning sensitive parameters from the URL hash without a page reload.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration enabling dark mode, custom design tokens (gold, navy, charcoal color palettes, Playfair Display/Inter fonts, CSS-variable-based semantic colors), and the typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Project state manifest describing the IPGT platform architecture, token economics (100B supply, 0.02 IPGT burn-on-registration, 48-month vesting), implemented features, and known issues at schema version 9.
